title: MERIDIAN Normalized Event
description: Common schema that every MERIDIAN data source (ACLED, ReliefWeb, GDELT, etc.) normalizes into. Downstream risk-scoring and RAG agents only ever read this shape, never the raw source format.

meridian_event_id.description: Deterministic hash of source + source_event_id, used to dedupe across re-runs.

source.description: Which data source this event originated from.

source_event_id.description: The original ID from the source system, e.g. ACLED's event_id_cnty.

event_date.description: ISO 8601 date the event occurred (not the date it was ingested).

iso3.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code, used to join across data sources cleanly.

region.description: MERIDIAN macro-region, e.g. 'West Africa', 'Andean Region', 'Southern Cone'. Mapped from country during normalization.

event_category.description: MERIDIAN's own coarse classification, mapped from each source's native event typing.

event_subtype.description: Source-native sub-type, preserved as-is for traceability (e.g. ACLED's 'Battles', 'Violence against civilians').

fatalities.description: Reported fatalities, if applicable to this event type.

severity_score.description: MERIDIAN-computed 0-10 severity score, derived during normalization (not raw from source).

narrative_summary.description: Short text description of the event, either source-provided or generated.

ingested_at.description: Timestamp when MERIDIAN ingested this record (not when the event occurred).

raw_source_data.description: The original, unmodified record from the source API, preserved for audit/debugging.
